# Contributing to LocalPad

Welcome! LocalPad is a lightweight open-source project and contributions of all kinds are appreciated.

## Getting Started

1. Fork the repo
2. Clone your fork: `git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/LocalPad.git`
3. Create a branch: `git checkout -b feat/your-feature`
4. Set up the backend and frontend locally (see README)
5. Make your changes
6. Open a Pull Request with a clear description

## Code Style

- **Frontend**: TypeScript strict mode. Format with Prettier.
- **Backend**: PEP 8. Type hints on all functions.
- **Commits**: Use conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)

## Good First Issues

Look for issues labelled [`good first issue`](https://github.com/BalajiRKB/LocalPad/issues?q=label%3A%22good+first+issue%22) — these are well-scoped and beginner-friendly.

## Reporting Bugs

Open an issue with:
- What you expected
- What happened instead
- Steps to reproduce
- Your OS + Node/Python version

## Feature Requests

Open an issue with a clear description of the use case. We prefer small, focused features over large sweeping changes.

## What's Out of Scope for v1

These are intentionally excluded from the MVP:
- Multi-user / auth
- Cloud sync
- Web search
- Voice/image features
- Agent marketplace

Feel free to propose these for future milestones!
